3050970.name: Eleanor Is Out of Time
3050970.description:
After a scientific mission to explore the past goes catastrophically wrong 24th century Eleanor finds herself trapped nearly a thousand years in the distant past.  Following her time ships crash landing its time travel capabilities are now tied to Eleanor herself allowing her to jump hundreds of years in an instant. 

OPEN WORLD EXPLORATION
Eleanor is trapped on Recharn Island, a remote outpost in the North Atlantic.  Explore the island with its towering mountains, rugged cliffs, sea caves, towns and castles. 
Use Eleanors time travelling abilities to explore different periods of the islands history and guide the small island community as it advances through the eras from a 15th century tribal village into a futuristic metropolis.

ONE HOUR TIME LOOP
The time travelling powers Eleanor now possesses are unstable and will only last an hour before Eleanor is returned to the beginning of the crash.

PEER THROUGH TIME
Use time lenses to gaze into the past or the future and see what dangers await before jumping.

MOVE EQUIPMENT BETWEEN THE ERAS
Not only can Eleanor jump through time but she can take objects and even people with her.

REPAIR THE SHIP
Eleanors Time Ship the Delphine lies shattered following the crash with its many components scattered across the entire island and across nearly a millenia.  Use Eleanors time travelling powers to retrieve the pieces and rebuild the ship, all while ensuring the Time Ships existence remains a closely guarded secret from the outside world.

RESCUE THE CREW
The Delphines crew who evacuated the ship are now scattered through time.  Eleanor must recscue them.

CREATE ALTERNATE TIMELINES
Eleanors actions in the past will affect the future from small changes to rewriting the entire course of history.   Key events will create entirely new timelines with radical changes to the islands society and technology.

SAFEGUARD THE PRIMARY TIMELINE
Eleanor must use her time travelling powers to repair the ship and get the crew back home to their own proper timeline in the 24th century, all while hiding the crashed time ships existence from the outside world for 900 years.
